/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -pie --coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/euxis-crypto-cpp_tests.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/euxis-crypto-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_aes_gcm.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-crypto-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_aes_gcm_aad.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-crypto-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_key_derivation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-crypto-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_ed25519.cpp.o" -o euxis-crypto-cpp_tests  libeuxis-crypto-cpp.a /usr/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libsodium.so /usr/lib/libgtest.so.1.17.0
